scripts.push: git add . && node -e "const d=new Date(); const s=d.getFullYear()+'-'+('0'+(d.getMonth()+1)).slice(-2)+'-'+('0'+d.getDate()).slice(-2)+' '+('0'+d.getHours()).slice(-2)+':'+('0'+d.getMinutes()).slice(-2)+':'+('0'+d.getSeconds()).slice(-2); try { require('child_process').execSync('git commit -m \"' + s + '\"'); } catch (e) { console.log('No changes to commit'); }" && git push origin main
